message:
🐛 Tighten quality gate: reject thin solutions, prose snippets, commit messages (#534)

- Require solution > 80 chars after stripping (rejects commit messages)
- Reject solutions that are mostly "Closes: #N" references
- Fix Closes:/Fixes: with colon not being stripped
- Filter conversational one-liners in numbered templates ("Not that I am aware of")
- Detect prose paragraphs in code snippets (>25% English stopwords = not code)
- Filter GitHub API JSON responses from code snippets
- Don't use issue title as error message in troubleshoot steps
- Use actual error/panic/fatal patterns from body for step error messages

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
